Package space.sunqian.fs.object.convert

Interface ObjectCopier

@ThreadSafe public interface ObjectCopier
This interface is used to copy data properties from an object to another object. The object should be a Map or a non-map object which can be parsed to MapSchema and ObjectSchema.

A copier can have default options. The options parameter of a copy method (such as copyProperties(Object, Type, Object, Type, ObjectConverter, Option[])) will be merged with the default options when the method is called.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    ObjectCopier.Handler
    Handler for ObjectCopier, provides the specific copy logic for copying each object property to the destination object.

    static @Nonnull ObjectCopier
    defaultCopier()
    Returns the default ObjectCopier.
    @Nonnull @Immutable List<@Nonnull Option<?,?>>

    @Nonnull @Immutable List<@Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler>
    handlers()
    Returns all handlers of this ObjectCopier.
    static @Nonnull ObjectCopier
    newCopier(@Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler> handlers)
    Creates and returns a default implementation of ObjectCopier with the given handlers, the default implementation and the default handler (CommonCopierHandler) follow the options from ConvertOption.
    static @Nonnull ObjectCopier
    newCopier(@Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler> handlers, @Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nonnull Option<?,?>> defaultOptions)
    Creates and returns a default implementation of ObjectCopier with the given handlers and default options, the default implementation and the default handler (CommonCopierHandler) follow the options from ConvertOption.
    static @Nonnull ObjectCopier
    newCopier(@Nonnull @RetainedParam ObjectCopier.Handler @Nonnull ... handlers)
    Creates and returns a default implementation of ObjectCopier with the given handlers, the default implementation and the default handler (CommonCopierHandler) follow the options from ConvertOption.
    default @Nonnull ObjectCopier
    withDefaultOptions(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... defaultOptions)
    Returns a new ObjectCopier of which default options are the given options.
    default @Nonnull ObjectCopier
    withFirstHandler(@Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler firstHandler)
    Returns a new ObjectCopier of which first handler is the given handler and the next handler is this ObjectCopier as a ObjectCopier.Handler.

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull ObjectCopier defaultCopier()

      • CommonCopierHandler.getInstance();
      Returns:
      the default ObjectCopier

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull ObjectCopier newCopier(@Nonnull @RetainedParam @Nonnull @RetainedParam ObjectCopier.Handler @Nonnull ... handlers)
      Creates and returns a default implementation of ObjectCopier with the given handlers, the default implementation and the default handler (CommonCopierHandler) follow the options from ConvertOption.
      Parameters:
      handlers - the given handlers
      Returns:
      a default implementation of ObjectCopier with the given handlers

    • newCopier

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull ObjectCopier newCopier(@Nonnull @RetainedParam @Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler> handlers)
      Creates and returns a default implementation of ObjectCopier with the given handlers, the default implementation and the default handler (CommonCopierHandler) follow the options from ConvertOption.

    • newCopier

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull ObjectCopier newCopier(@Nonnull @RetainedParam @Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler> handlers, @Nonnull @RetainedParam @Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nonnull Option<?,?>> defaultOptions)
      Creates and returns a default implementation of ObjectCopier with the given handlers and default options, the default implementation and the default handler (CommonCopierHandler) follow the options from ConvertOption.
      Parameters:
      handlers - given handlers
      defaultOptions - given default options
      Returns:
      a default implementation of ObjectCopier with the given handlers and default options

    • copyProperties

      default void copyProperties(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object src, @Nonnull @Nonnull Object dst, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws ObjectCopyException
      Copy properties from the given source object to the given destination object. The object can be a Map or a non-map object which can be parsed to ObjectSchema.

      The options parameter can be empty, in which case the default behavior will be used, or built-in options in ConvertOption or other custom options for custom implementations.

      Parameters:
      src - the given source object
      dst - the given destination object
      options - the options for copying properties
      Throws:
      ObjectCopyException - if an error occurs during copying properties

    • copyProperties

      default void copyProperties(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object src, @Nonnull @Nonnull Object dst, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws ObjectCopyException
      Copy properties from the given source object to the given destination object. The object can be a Map or a non-map object which can be parsed to ObjectSchema.

      The options parameter can be empty, in which case the default behavior will be used, or built-in options in ConvertOption or other custom options for custom implementations.

      Parameters:
      src - the given source object
      dst - the given destination object
      converter - the converter for converting values of the properties if needed
      options - the options for copying properties
      Throws:
      ObjectCopyException - if an error occurs during copying properties

    • copyProperties

      default void copyProperties(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object src, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type srcType, @Nonnull @Nonnull Object dst, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type dstType, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws ObjectCopyException
      Copy properties from the given source object to the given destination object. The object can be a Map or a non-map object which can be parsed to ObjectSchema.

      The options parameter can be empty, in which case the default behavior will be used, or built-in options in ConvertOption or other custom options for custom implementations.

      Parameters:
      src - the given source object
      srcType - specifies the type of the given source object
      dst - the given destination object
      dstType - specifies the type of the given destination object
      options - the options for copying properties
      Throws:
      ObjectCopyException - if an error occurs during copying properties

    • copyProperties

      void copyProperties(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object src, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type srcType, @Nonnull @Nonnull Object dst, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type dstType, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws ObjectCopyException
      Copy properties from the given source object to the given destination object. The object can be a Map or a non-map object which can be parsed to ObjectSchema.

      The options parameter can be empty, in which case the default behavior will be used, or built-in options in ConvertOption or other custom options for custom implementations.

      Parameters:
      src - the given source object
      srcType - specifies the type of the given source object
      dst - the given destination object
      dstType - specifies the type of the given destination object
      converter - the converter for converting values of the properties if needed
      options - the options for copying properties
      Throws:
      ObjectCopyException - if an error occurs during copying properties

    • handlers

      @Nonnull @Immutable @Nonnull @Immutable List<@Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler> handlers()
      Returns all handlers of this ObjectCopier.
      Returns:
      all handlers of this ObjectCopier

    • defaultOptions

      @Nonnull @Immutable @Nonnull @Immutable List<@Nonnull Option<?,?>> defaultOptions()
      Returns the default options of this ObjectCopier.
      Returns:
      the default options of this ObjectCopier

    • withFirstHandler

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull ObjectCopier withFirstHandler(@Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler firstHandler)
      Returns a new ObjectCopier of which first handler is the given handler and the next handler is this ObjectCopier as a ObjectCopier.Handler. This method is equivalent: 
      
 newConverter(firstHandler, this.asHandler())
      Parameters:
      firstHandler - the first handler
      Returns:
      a new ObjectCopier of which first handler is the given handler and the next handler is this ObjectCopier as a ObjectCopier.Handler

    • withDefaultOptions

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull ObjectCopier withDefaultOptions(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... defaultOptions)
      Returns a new ObjectCopier of which default options are the given options.
      Parameters:
      defaultOptions - the default options
      Returns:
      a new ObjectCopier of which default options are the given options

    • asHandler

      @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectCopier.Handler asHandler()
      Returns this ObjectCopier as a ObjectCopier.Handler.
      Returns:
      this ObjectCopier as a ObjectCopier.Handler
